hooks.command: input=$(cat); exit_code=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.exitCode // 0'); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push' && [ "$exit_code" = '0' ]; then cd /home/user/sosoking && cur=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$cur" != 'main' ]; then git checkout main 2>/dev/null && git merge --ff-only "$cur" 2>/dev/null || git merge "$cur" 2>/dev/null && git push origin main; fi; echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ main 브랜치 배포 완료"}'; fi; exit 0
